title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 46.101
text:
46.101.  Knox. — Beginning in the northwest corner of section three, township sixty-three, range thirteen, west; thence south with the subdivisional lines to the southwest corner of section thirty-four, township sixty, range thirteen, west; thence east with the township line between townships fifty-nine and sixty to the southeast corner of township sixty, range ten, west; thence north with the range line between ranges nine and ten to the northeast corner of township sixty-three, range ten, west; thence west with the township line between township sixty-three and sixty-four to the place of beginning.
(RSMo 1939 § 13569) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11910; 1919 § 9312; 1909 § 3529
